verse.name: V1
verse.lines: Majesty, worship His majesty Unto Jesus be all glory Honor and praise.

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: Majesty, kingdom, authority Flow from His throne Unto His own His anthem raise.

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: So exalt lift up on high The name of Jesus Magnify come glorify Christ Jesus the King.

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: Majesty worship His majesty Jesus who died now glorified King of all kings.
